hero_title_accent: Audit Trail for Digital Asset VASPs
hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider checks into unified workflows that preserve audit-ready evidence and decision logs across KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and case management processes.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness falters without workflow standardization
problem_description: Compliance operations struggle when audit trails remain inconsistent and decisions are logged separately across multiple provider outputs. This creates gaps that slow reviews, obscure decision history, and complicate defensible regulatory reporting for VASP compliance teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider checks, decision logs, reviewer actions and evidence into one auditable workflow that simplifies review, preserves case history and supports defensible compliance reporting.
workflow_title: From provider checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY applies internal rules to provider outputs then routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves evidence for a standardized audit trail.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY structures provider outputs into linked cases, decisions and evidence so compliance teams maintain a consistent, auditable trail across workflows and regulatory rule updates.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a provider-neutral layer that preserves review logs, evidence packages and operational governance for defensible compliance workflows and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support standardized audit trails for compliance
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how workflows capture and preserve audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how decision logs support traceability across compliance cases
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider outputs in case workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs with a connected compliance layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready reports across KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule processes.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules to route alerts, open cases, assign reviews and record decisions, creating standardized workflows that reduce manual handoffs and improve operational consistency for compliance teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, review history, case evidence and regulatory rule changes to support audit readiness and enable clear traceability of compliance decisions and actions over time.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into one operational compliance stack without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but complements them by turning their outputs into structured compliance workflows, evidence packages and reports for easier review and audit.
final_title: Create a standardized audit trail for compliance
final_description: Review how SFTY structures provider outputs into connected workflows, preserving audit-ready evidence and decision logs across compliance cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
